name: Thai Shrimp Stir-Fry
intro: Elevate your culinary experience with this vibrant dish that combines the flavors of Thai cuisine. The delightful combination of red pepper, snow peas, and shrimp is enhanced by the rich and flavorful peanut sauce. A touch of ginger and red pepper flakes adds an extra kick of deliciousness. To complete the dish, serve this colorful main course over a bed of pasta, creating a fusion of Thai and Italian influences that will surely impress your taste buds.
method: Heat canola oil in a large non-stick skillet or wok, then sauté the red pepper for 1 minute.
Sauté the snow peas, scallions, and garlic for 2-3 minutes. When done, transfer the mixture to a plate.
In the same wok, combine broth, paprika, ginger, sesame oil, vinegar, soy sauce, and peanut butter. Cook and stir until the peanut butter melts and the mixture starts boiling.
Add shrimp and cook (stirring) for 2 minutes.
Return red pepper mixture (Step 2) to the wok.
